topic: Iron deficiency in women: signs beyond fatigue
caption:
Are you one of the 1 in 3 women silently struggling with hidden iron deficiency? 🤯 It's more common in women than you think, and its signs extend far beyond just feeling tired. Iron is absolutely critical for carrying oxygen throughout your body 🩸, so when levels drop, every system can be impacted. From unexplained hair loss 💇‍♀️ to restless legs syndrome and even brittle nails 💅, your body might be sending subtle but urgent signals. Pay attention to unusual cravings like ice (pica) 🧊 – these are not normal and often point directly to an iron deficit. Don't self-diagnose; if any of these signs resonate, consult your doctor for a proper diagnosis and treatment plan 🩺.
